cmd: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d /tmp/lfortran-c-split-forbid.XXXXXX); trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT; lfortran --backend=c --separate-compilation -c {infile} -o "$tmpdir/main.o" > "$tmpdir/compile.out" 2> "$tmpdir/compile.err" && (! grep -R -F -q "__libasr_created__intrinsic_array_function_MatMul->data = a->data" "$tmpdir"/*.o.tmp.split/*.c "$tmpdir"/*.o.tmp.split/*.h) #
